description:
Create a Gentrification Displacement Risk Index for San Francisco zones by cross-referencing household income data with residential market prices using the data in /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5 and the notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/displacement_risk.ipynb. Assign households to zones using the building and parcel relationships. Calculate a composite displacement risk score for each zone by summing the percentile ranks of the percentage of low-income households (income < 50,000) and the median residential sales price (excluding zero or missing values). Only include zones with at least 50 households and valid price data.

Export the results to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/displacement_risk.csv, sorted descending by risk score, including columns for zone_id, total_households, pct_low_income, median_sales_price, low_income_score, market_pressure_score, and displacement_risk_score. Save a summary to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/risk_summary.json with the total count of analyzed zones, the highest risk zone_id, and the mean displacement score. Finally, save a scatter plot to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/displacement_risk_plot.png showing the relationship between low-income percentage and median sales price, with the top 20 highest-risk zones highlighted in a different color.
